text: Mija, are you still coming for Sunday lunch? Making sancocho
Of course Mama! I'll bring Kagiso and some Chenin. What time?
1 o'clock. Marco and the kids are coming too. Drive safe!
Sis, Thabiso won't stop talking about visiting the radio station. Any chance?
Yes! Bring him on a Friday after the show, I'll give him a proper studio tour
He's going to lose his mind. Thank you sis
Morning love. Off-Mic trailer edit is looking good, want to watch tonight?
Yes please! I'll cook. Empanadas?
Always yes to empanadas. See you at 7
Hi Sofia, are you still ok to help with the family lunch logistics on Sunday?
Yes all sorted. I'll bring the tres leches
You're a star. See you Sunday x
Babe still on for brunch Saturday? Lucky Bean booked
100%. After my long run at Emmarentia. So much to tell you about Off-Mic
Can't wait! I have PR ideas for the launch too
Sipho, can we move the production meeting to 11 tomorrow? Pre-interview ran long
No problem. I'll let Naledi and Nomsa know
Thanks. Also let's lock the Sun-El track for Friday's closer
Asha, the Mandla clip is cut and uploaded. Sounds great
Brilliant work Naledi, thank you. I'll share it with him
Cool. Want me to start on the Voices of the City audio next?
Morning Nomsa, confirming Thursday 10:00 for the documentary budget chat
Confirmed. Bring Kagiso's production plan if it's ready
Will do. See you Thursday
Hi Mandla, the music feature clip is live. Sending the link now
Love it. Sharing with my followers. Count me in for the anniversary doc
Amazing, thank you. I'll send dates soon
Family - Sunday lunch at Mom's this weekend. 1pm. Sofia is making tres leches
Kids already asking about the radio station tour 😅
Count me and Kagiso in. I'll bring Chenin and a tres leches backup just in case 🍷
Mija no need, Sofia's tres leches is enough. Just bring yourselves
Reminder: Marco's birthday asado at the house on the 24th of October, 2pm. Save the date 🎂
Heart day greetings to my familia. Te quiero mucho ❤️
Love you Mama. Te quiero ❤️
Love you all. Thabiso made cards at school, will bring them Sunday
Feliz Navidad mi familia. Sancocho ready by 1pm, come hungry
Feliz Navidad! On our way, bringing the empanadas and a bottle of Chenin
Kids losing their minds. See you soon ❤️
Year-end planning: Marco birthday 24 Oct, Mom's check on her BP this Sunday call, and Sofia let me know if you need help with school run logistics
Mija como amaneciste? Show today?
Si Mama, on air in an hour.
Recuerda el sancocho el domingo.
Dale. I'll bring empanadas Marco loves.
Blood pressure 128/82 this morning.
Great numbers Mom. Keep with the walks.
Kagiso viene el domingo?
Si, tres leches maybe.
Escuche la entrevista con Grace. Bellisima.
Gracias Mama. She's back next quarter.
